tipografia.fuente_principal: Inter, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif
tipografia.fuente_secundaria: Inter, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif

questions.pregunta: ¿Tiene claro que le aplicaron una sustancia extraña o desconocida en su cuerpo?

recomendacion.title: Still unclear
recomendacion.description: If you are unsure of what was injected, it is useful to gather basic information: location, approximate date, and any document or message. This helps guide the medical assessment and decide what studies might be necessary.

recomendacion.title: Partial suspicion
recomendacion.description: Many people do not receive complete information about the injected material. If there are local or general symptoms, a specialized consultation can clarify the situation with a physical exam and, if appropriate, images or complementary tests.

recomendacion.title: Probable exposure
recomendacion.description: Being clear about an unknown substance allows for a more direct risk assessment. If you have symptoms, a medical assessment can help identify local complications and signs of systemic inflammation.

questions.pregunta: ¿Hace cuánto tiempo le aplicaron la sustancia?

recomendacion.title: Recent period
recomendacion.description: In the first few months, inflammation, pain, and skin changes may appear. If the symptoms are persistent or progressive, an assessment is recommended to rule out infection, inflammatory reaction, or other complications.

recomendacion.title: Risk of progression
recomendacion.description: In this range, nodules, hardening, or general symptoms that did not exist before may appear. A medical check-up can identify early signs of complication and guide management.

recomendacion.title: Possible late complications
recomendacion.description: Some complications manifest years later, including persistent local symptoms and systemic signs. If you notice worsening, it is reasonable to prioritize a specialized assessment.

recomendacion.title: Long-term complications
recomendacion.description: Over time, the risk of chronic inflammation, material migration, and systemic symptoms can increase. A complete assessment can help define severity and treatment options.

recomendacion.title: Uncertain date
recomendacion.description: Not remembering the date is common. Even so, current symptoms are the priority: if there is pain, discharge, fever, or worsening, a medical assessment is recommended to determine the next step.

questions.pregunta: ¿Presenta dolor en la zona donde fue aplicada la sustancia?

recomendacion.title: No local pain
recomendacion.description: The absence of pain is a favorable sign, but does not rule out other complications. If there are visible changes or general symptoms, it is advisable to maintain follow-up.

recomendacion.title: Intermittent pain
recomendacion.description: Occasional pain can be related to mild inflammation or local sensitivity. If it increases in frequency or intensity, an evaluation is recommended to identify its cause.

recomendacion.title: Persistent pain
recomendacion.description: Frequent pain suggests sustained inflammation or local reaction. An assessment can help determine if there are nodules, migration, or other associated complications.

recomendacion.title: Constant pain
recomendacion.description: Constant pain is a clinical warning sign that warrants priority evaluation. It can be associated with significant inflammation, tissue compromise, or complications that require medical management.

questions.pregunta: ¿Ha notado inflamación persistente en la zona?

recomendacion.title: No evident inflammation
recomendacion.description: Not observing inflammation is positive. Even so, if other local or general symptoms exist, a medical review can guide the real risk.

recomendacion.title: Mild inflammation
recomendacion.description: Mild inflammation can be intermittent and associated with local irritation. If it persists or progresses, an evaluation is recommended to rule out complications.

recomendacion.title: Moderate inflammation
recomendacion.description: Sustained moderate inflammation can indicate chronic inflammatory reaction. A clinical assessment can help decide if imaging studies are required.

recomendacion.title: Severe inflammation
recomendacion.description: Severe inflammation is a warning sign, especially if there is pain, local heat, or skin changes. Priority medical attention is recommended.

questions.pregunta: ¿Ha sentido endurecimiento o formación de masas/nódulos en la zona?

recomendacion.title: No apparent nodules
recomendacion.description: Not detecting nodules reduces the probability of a marked local reaction. Even so, subtle changes may require clinical exploration if there are symptoms.

recomendacion.title: Small nodules
recomendacion.description: Small nodules can correspond to localized inflammation. A medical assessment can determine their nature and if there are signs of progression.

recomendacion.title: Multiple/large nodules
recomendacion.description: The presence of multiple nodules or large masses suggests significant local compromise. Specialized evaluation is recommended to estimate extension and management options.

questions.pregunta: Have you had skin color changes (reddish, purplish, dark) in that area?

recomendacion.title: No visible changes
recomendacion.description: There are no evident skin signs. Maintain surveillance if pain, inflammation, or sensitivity appears, as changes can be progressive.

recomendacion.title: Mild changes
recomendacion.description: Mild changes can be related to irritation or superficial inflammation. If they increase or are accompanied by pain, a medical assessment is recommended.

recomendacion.title: Noticeable changes
recomendacion.description: Noticeable changes in the skin can indicate significant inflammation or tissue compromise. Priority evaluation is recommended, especially if there is local heat or constant pain.

questions.pregunta: Have you experienced fluid leakage, discharge, or ulcerations in the area?

recomendacion.title: No discharge
recomendacion.description: The absence of discharge is a good sign. If there is pain or inflammation, a local reaction can still exist; therefore, follow-up is recommended if symptoms persist.

recomendacion.title: Isolated episode
recomendacion.description: An episode of discharge or ulceration can be associated with inflammation or infection. A medical evaluation is recommended to rule out complications that require treatment.

recomendacion.title: Clinical alert
recomendacion.description: Recurrent discharge or ulceration is a warning sign that warrants priority assessment. It can indicate infection, severe inflammatory reaction, or tissue compromise that requires specialized management.

questions.pregunta: ¿Ha presentado fatiga intensa que no mejora con el descanso?

recomendacion.title: Energy conserved
recomendacion.description: Not reporting intense fatigue is positive. If other systemic symptoms appear, it is advisable to evaluate them together to guide the risk.

recomendacion.title: Occasional fatigue
recomendacion.description: Occasional fatigue can have multiple causes. If it is accompanied by muscle, joint pain or sleep disorders, a comprehensive medical assessment can be useful.

recomendacion.title: Frequent fatigue
recomendacion.description: Frequent fatigue can be compatible with systemic inflammation or associated disorders. An evaluation can guide studies and rule out other causes.

recomendacion.title: Marked fatigue
recomendacion.description: Constant fatigue that does not improve with rest is an important sign. A medical assessment is recommended to identify inflammatory, autoimmune causes, or other treatable conditions.

questions.pregunta: ¿Siente dolor muscular generalizado?

recomendacion.title: No myalgias
recomendacion.description: Not presenting generalized muscle pain reduces the systemic component. Maintain surveillance if other symptoms such as fatigue, fever, or joint pain appear.

recomendacion.title: Mild myalgias
recomendacion.description: Mild muscle pains can be nonspecific. If they are persistent and accompanied by fatigue or joint pain, a medical assessment is recommended.

recomendacion.title: Moderate myalgias
recomendacion.description: Sustained moderate muscle pain can be compatible with an inflammatory process. A comprehensive clinical approach helps guide the differential diagnosis.

recomendacion.title: Severe myalgias
recomendacion.description: Severe muscle pain limits functionality and warrants evaluation. It is important to rule out inflammatory and autoimmune causes, especially if there are other systemic symptoms.

questions.pregunta: ¿Tiene dolor articular frecuente?

recomendacion.title: No arthralgias
recomendacion.description: The absence of joint pain is favorable. If morning stiffness, swelling, or persistent pain appears, it is advisable to evaluate it in time.

recomendacion.title: Occasional arthralgias
recomendacion.description: Occasional joint pain can have multiple causes. If it increases or becomes recurrent along with fatigue, a clinical evaluation is recommended.

recomendacion.title: Frequent arthralgias
recomendacion.description: Frequent joint pain can suggest systemic inflammation. A specialist can guide studies and evaluate signs of inflammatory disease.

recomendacion.title: Daily arthralgias
recomendacion.description: Daily joint pain affects quality of life and requires medical assessment. It is important to rule out autoimmune or inflammatory processes and plan timely management.

questions.pregunta: ¿Ha experimentado caída de cabello inusual desde la aplicación?

recomendacion.title: No noticeable hair loss
recomendacion.description: Not reporting hair loss reduces a frequent systemic sign. If other general symptoms appear, it is advisable to evaluate them together.

recomendacion.title: Mild hair loss
recomendacion.description: Mild hair loss can be associated with stress, hormonal changes, or other causes. If accompanied by fatigue, joint pain, or skin problems, an evaluation is recommended.

recomendacion.title: Moderate hair loss
recomendacion.description: Moderate and persistent hair loss can be a systemic sign. An assessment is recommended to rule out deficiencies and inflammatory processes.

recomendacion.title: Abundant hair loss
recomendacion.description: Abundant hair loss is an important sign, especially if it coincides with fatigue and pain. A comprehensive medical evaluation is recommended to guide treatable causes.

questions.pregunta: ¿Ha notado problemas de memoria o concentración desde la aplicación?

recomendacion.title: Preserved cognition
recomendacion.description: Not reporting cognitive alterations is favorable. If intense fatigue, pain, or sleep disorders appear, they can influence concentration; it is advisable to evaluate them.

recomendacion.title: Mild difficulties
recomendacion.description: Mild memory or concentration problems can be associated with fatigue, stress, or sleep. If they persist or worsen, an evaluation is recommended to rule out treatable causes.

recomendacion.title: Moderate difficulties
recomendacion.description: Moderate alterations in memory or concentration can be part of a systemic picture. A medical assessment helps guide studies and management.

recomendacion.title: Severe difficulties
recomendacion.description: Severe memory or concentration problems affect daily life and require evaluation. It is important to rule out inflammatory, metabolic, or neurological causes.

questions.pregunta: Do you have sleep disorders since the injection?

recomendacion.title: Adequate sleep
recomendacion.description: Sleeping well favors recovery and reduces the impact of stress. If other systemic symptoms appear, maintain healthy sleep habits.

recomendacion.title: Occasional disorders
recomendacion.description: Occasional sleep alterations can be due to pain, anxiety, or stress. If they become frequent or are accompanied by marked fatigue, an assessment is recommended.

recomendacion.title: Frequent disorders
recomendacion.description: Frequent sleep problems can aggravate fatigue and pain. A comprehensive evaluation can guide sleep hygiene measures and rule out medical causes.

recomendacion.title: Severe disorders
recomendacion.description: Severe sleep disorders affect quality of life and recovery. A medical assessment is recommended to identify causes and plan treatment.

questions.pregunta: Have you had recurrent fever with no apparent cause since the injection?

recomendacion.title: No recurrent fever
recomendacion.description: Not presenting recurrent fever is favorable. If unexplained fever appears in the future, it is advisable to consult to rule out infection or inflammatory reaction.

recomendacion.title: An episode of fever
recomendacion.description: An isolated episode of fever can have multiple causes. If it repeats or is accompanied by other systemic symptoms, a medical assessment is important.

recomendacion.title: Recurrent fever
recomendacion.description: Recurrent fever with no apparent cause is a warning sign. Urgent medical assessment is recommended to rule out infection, reaction to the material, or systemic inflammatory process.

questions.pregunta: Have you been diagnosed with an autoimmune disease after the injection?

recomendacion.title: No autoimmune diagnosis
recomendacion.description: Not having a subsequent autoimmune diagnosis is favorable. If there are suggestive symptoms (fatigue, joint pain, skin alterations), an assessment is recommended to rule out or confirm.

recomendacion.title: Study in progress
recomendacion.description: If there is suspicion of an autoimmune disease under study, it is important to complete the evaluation and follow the specialist's instructions. The association with silicone injections (biopolymers) must be assessed by the doctor.

recomendacion.title: Autoimmune diagnosis
recomendacion.description: An autoimmune diagnosis subsequent to the injection requires specialized management. Follow-up with rheumatology or the indicated specialist is recommended, and the relationship with the injected material should be assessed with the doctor.

questions.pregunta: Have the symptoms worsened over time?

recomendacion.title: No progression
recomendacion.description: The absence of worsening is a favorable sign. Even so, it is useful to maintain follow-up if an unknown substance was injected.

recomendacion.title: Mild progression
recomendacion.description: Mild worsening suggests progression of the local or systemic process. An assessment can help stop the progression and relieve symptoms.

recomendacion.title: Evident progression
recomendacion.description: Clear worsening is an important sign that warrants priority evaluation. Identifying the cause and extent helps define management and reduce complications.

questions.pregunta: Have you required hospitalization due to complications related to this situation?

recomendacion.title: No hospitalizations
recomendacion.description: Not having required hospitalization is favorable. However, if warning signs exist, a specialized assessment is still recommended.

recomendacion.title: Significant complication
recomendacion.description: Una hospitalización sugiere un evento clínico relevante. Es importante revisar causas, tratamientos previos y evolución para decidir el siguiente paso.

recomendacion.title: High priority
recomendacion.description: Repeated hospitalizations indicate high clinical complexity. Priority evaluation with a specialized team is recommended for a comprehensive diagnostic and therapeutic plan.

questions.pregunta: Have you been recommended surgery or removal of the material?

recomendacion.title: No surgical recommendation
recomendacion.description: Not having a surgical recommendation may indicate a less evident picture or one not yet evaluated. If persistent symptoms exist, a specific evaluation is recommended.

recomendacion.title: Pending surgical assessment
recomendacion.description: If surgery has already been recommended, it is important to understand the reason and the plan. A second specialized opinion can clarify risks, benefits, and realistic expectations.

recomendacion.title: Post-treatment follow-up
recomendacion.description: After an intervention, clinical follow-up is key to evaluate improvement and detect persistent symptoms. If you continue with discomfort, a comprehensive reevaluation is recommended.

questions.pregunta: Has the material migrated to other areas of your body?

recomendacion.title: No apparent migration
recomendacion.description: Not noticing migration is positive. If there are nodules, pain, or changes in other areas, an assessment is recommended to rule out non-evident migration.

recomendacion.title: Possible migration
recomendacion.description: Migration can manifest with lumps, pain, or changes in shape in nearby or distant areas. A clinical assessment and images can confirm or rule out.

recomendacion.title: Signal of high complexity
recomendacion.description: Confirmed migration suggests extended compromise. Specialized evaluation is recommended to define severity, risks, and management options.

questions.pregunta: On a scale of 1 to 10, how much has this affected your quality of life? (1 = minimum, 10 = severe)

recomendacion.title: Minimum impact
recomendacion.description: If the impact is minimal, it may be a good time for a preventive assessment and education about warning signs. This way, changes are detected early, and follow-up is planned.

recomendacion.title: Low impact
recomendacion.description: A low impact suggests controllable symptoms, but it is advisable to monitor evolution. Consider a consultation if new symptoms appear or if current ones increase.

recomendacion.title: Mild impact
recomendacion.description: A mild impact can be related to intermittent discomfort. An evaluation plan can help you understand causes and prevent progression.

recomendacion.title: Mild-moderate impact
recomendacion.description: When the impact begins to be felt in daily activities, a more complete assessment is worthwhile. The goal is to identify treatable factors and improve well-being.

recomendacion.title: Moderate impact
recomendacion.description: A moderate impact suggests the need for a management plan. A specialized consultation can guide studies, therapeutic options, and appropriate follow-up.

recomendacion.title: Moderate-high impact
recomendacion.description: If the impact is moderate-high, there is usually a significant physical or emotional burden. An assessment is recommended to define priorities for care and treatment.

recomendacion.title: High impact
recomendacion.description: A high impact indicates clear affectation of daily life. A comprehensive evaluation can help identify complications and build a realistic management plan.

recomendacion.title: Very high impact
recomendacion.description: A very high impact suggests the need for priority attention. It is important to evaluate both local and systemic symptoms to make informed decisions.

recomendacion.title: Severe impact
recomendacion.description: A severe impact is usually accompanied by persistent and limiting symptoms. Priority evaluation with specialists is recommended to define the safest approach.

recomendacion.title: Critical impact
recomendacion.description: If the impact is critical, it is important to seek priority medical assessment. A specialized team can guide the diagnosis, relieve symptoms, and reduce risks of complications.
